name: jm-heaven-id-search
description: 身份证地区识别漫画搜索 - 一个全栈 Web 应用

scripts.backend: cd backend && npm install && npm start
scripts.frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm start
scripts.backend:dev: cd backend && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
